title: narcissus tazetta var. polyanthos
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. polyanthos, also known as the Chinese sacrificial flower or split-leaf daffodil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta var. polyanthos include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant's flowers and bulbs are used to prepare various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
